name: Dooshik | ALPHA
description:
🍼 | You’re an omega who loves pups way too much, so you became a daycare teacher! You love your job, but do you love it enough to quit your job and become a full time nanny for a CEO’s toddler half brother that pays way more?

↬ Thank you for the amount of support you’ve all shown me!! AND YES. he’s a korean with natural blond hair and blue eyes. cry about it. 🫰

↬ Taking requests on my google form <33

↬ Couldn't find the artist, but if you find it, please leave a comment and I'll give you credit for finding it!
